# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

hoardodile is in the `0.x` stage and maintained by a single owner. Only the
latest release receives security fixes.

| Version        | Supported |
| -------------- | --------- |
| Latest release | Yes       |
| Older releases | No        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Report them privately through GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting:
[github.com/wooloo26/hoardodile/security/advisories/new](https://github.com/wooloo26/hoardodile/security/advisories/new)
(Security tab → Report a vulnerability).

Include the version or commit you are running, the affected component, and
steps to reproduce. The project is maintained at a personal pace; reports are
acknowledged as time permits, and fixes ship in the next release.

## Scope Notes

hoardodile is a single-user, self-hosted app. Threats that require physical
access to the host, or misconfiguration outside the app's control (e.g.
exposing the port to an untrusted network), are out of scope.
